testing_centers.notes: Available at Pearson VUE test centers worldwide

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. ID must match the name on the exam registration. Acceptable forms include passport, driver's license, or national ID card.
exam_rules: Open-book exam. Physical and electronic notes are permitted — building a comprehensive index is a key preparation strategy. No internet access during the exam except to pre-loaded approved materials. Proctored at Pearson VUE centers or online via ProctorU. Candidates have a 4-month window to schedule and take the exam after registration.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 4 years. Renewal requires 36 CPE (Continuing Professional Education) credits earned over the 4-year period, plus a $429 renewal fee. Alternatively, candidates may retake the current exam to renew.

retake_policy.notes: Two free practice tests are included with each exam registration. Candidates have a 4-month window to take the exam after registration. Retake fees apply after the first failed attempt. Contact GIAC for specific retake waiting periods.

official_study_resources.title: SANS Institute Training Courses
official_study_resources.notes: GIAC certifications are aligned with SANS Institute courses (e.g., SEC401 → GSEC, SEC504 → GCIH)

official_study_resources.title: GIAC Practice Tests (included with registration)
official_study_resources.notes: 2 free practice tests included with every GIAC exam registration
